title: Sum of Two Numbers
description: Write a function named 'add' that takes two parameters (a, b) and returns their sum.

title: Is Even
description: Write a function named 'isEven' that takes one parameter (n) and returns true if it is even, false otherwise.

title: Max in Array
description: Write a function named 'max' that takes an array of numbers and returns the largest number.

title: Factorial
description: Write a function named 'factorial' that takes a positive integer n and returns n! (n factorial).

title: Anagram Check
description: Write a function named 'areAnagrams' that takes two strings and returns true if they are anagrams, false otherwise.
